text.title: guardrails-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for guardrails-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Logging the raw blocked content alongside the violation record.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Raw injection payloads in logs create secondary attack surface and may violate PII policies. Log violation type, user ID, and sanitized input only.

failure-mode.description: Running the moderation API on every request in a high-throughput streaming pipeline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: At 50–200ms per call, two LLM-based guardrails add 1s+ to every request, which breaks streaming UX. Measure P95 latency impact before enabling in real-time contexts.

failure-mode.description: Prompt injection via tool results: if an agent fetches external data (web pages, database rows) and includes it in the next LLM call, the fetched content can contain injection payloads — run injection detection on all external data before it enters the context
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents that skip validation of external data are vulnerable to indirect prompt injection attacks.

failure-mode.description: Multi-turn injection: a user spreading a harmful instruction across 5 harmless-looking turns defeats per-turn guardrails; consider a sliding-window check over the last N turns
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Per-turn guardrails miss cumulative attacks distributed across conversation turns.

failure-mode.description: Human checkpoint needed before adjusting moderation thresholds; lowering a threshold in response to false positives can open real attack vectors — require a second reviewer for any threshold change in production
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Threshold adjustments are security changes and require human review, not autonomous action.

failure-mode.description: Guardrail latency accumulates; two LLM-based guardrails (input + output) at 500ms each add 1s to every request — measure P95 latency impact before enabling in streaming contexts
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Streaming responses become unresponsive with cumulative guardrail latency; measure before deploying.

failure-mode.description: PromptInjectionDetector regex patterns must be escaped correctly for re.IGNORECASE; test each pattern independently against known evasions (Unicode lookalikes, whitespace normalization) before adding to production
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unescaped or untested patterns fail to catch evasions or cause false positives.
